response.justification: The candidate is a seasoned full-stack engineer with roughly 15 years of hands-on software development across web, mobile, embedded, and data-integration systems, plus some recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling. However, the role is a Director-level Principal Engineer focused on AI strategy, requiring recognized AI expertise, demonstrated AI products/platforms, cloud architecture leadership, and advisory experience with strategic customers — none of which are evidenced in the resume. AI involvement is limited to a few months of recent tooling work, and there is no track record of engineering leadership at the principal/director scope this role demands.
strengths: ~15 years of polyglot full-stack and infrastructure engineering experience
Strong software craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, testing tools authored
Recent hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators
concerns: No demonstrated AI products, platforms, or recognized AI expertise at the required level
Lacks principal/director-scope leadership, strategy, or customer-advisory experience
Cloud expertise is limited (some AWS CDK); no evidence of cloud architecture leadership

key_factors.factor: Missing recognized AI expertise and shipped AI products
No principal/director-level strategy or advisory experience
Deep, broad hands-on engineering background with craftsmanship rigor
